tweets.content: Hope I don't stutter too much. 🤣

POLL: ICE has been abused by the Fake News Media at levels never seen before. They are Great Patriots who work hard, and do a fantastic job in a very hostile environment. Much of this hostility is caused by the Dumocrats and the Fake News. The concept I have had for quite some time — A strong feeling that the name of these Patriots, “ICE,” should be changed to, “NICE,” in that it will totally discombobulate Crooked, Dishonest, and Unpatriotic Reporters and Journalists. For them to say, “We went to a NICE Facility today,” as opposed to “ICE” or, “NICE Agents have deported a Violent Drug Dealer,” they won’t be able to handle it, they will go totally crazy! All it means is adding an “N” (“National”) to “ICE (“Immigration and Customs Enforcement”) — A much more prestigious name. Everyone loves it, but I have been told by the legendary Tom Homan that the Agents do not love it as much as the other population. Who thinks that we should add an “N” to change the name of “ICE” to “NICE?”   Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DJT
tweets.translated: 民意调查：假新闻媒体对 ICE 的滥用达到了前所未有的程度。他们是伟大的爱国者，他们努力工作，在非常恶劣的环境中做得非常出色。这种敌意很大程度上是由杜民主派和假新闻引起的。我有一段时间一直有这样的想法——一种强烈的感觉，这些爱国者的名字“ICE”应该改为“NICE”，因为这将彻底扰乱不诚实、不诚实、不爱国的记者和记者。对于他们来说，“我们今天去了一家 NICE 设施”，而不是“ICE”或“NICE 特工驱逐了一名暴力毒贩”，他们将无法处理，他们会完全疯掉！这意味着在“ICE”（“移民和海关执法局”）中添加一个“N”（“国家”）——一个更有声望的名字。每个人都喜欢它，但传奇人物汤姆·霍曼告诉我，特工们并不像其他人那样喜欢它。谁认为我们应该添加一个“N”来将“ICE”的名字改为“NICE”？   感谢您对此事的关注！总裁DJT

tweets.content: Feels like the only thing that hasn’t crashed… Is memory like $MU, indexes, or large cap semis like Intel so far. - Photonics from $AXTI to $SIVE down 40%. - Space from $ASTS and $RKLB down 40% 1M. - Popular AI names like $PLTR is down ~35% YTD. - Software like $CRM down -40%. - Bitcoin sub <60k, Ethereum sub <$16k. Not a fun time with a hawkish fed narrative and potential rate hikes. However this does sorta feel overshot due to margin liquidations on less liquid assets compared to mega caps. But we’ll see what happens, usually fundamentals override liquidity shock in the longer run. I’m still personally bullish on the AI buildout + upstream AI capex beneficiaries, but 1-2 potential rate hikes certainly don’t help.
tweets.translated: 感觉像是唯一没有崩溃的东西……到目前为止，是像 $MU、指数这样的内存，还是像英特尔这样的大盘股。 - 光子学从 $AXTI 降至 $SIVE 下降 40%。 - $ASTS 和 $RKLB 的空间减少了 40% 1M。 - $PLTR 等热门 AI 名称今年迄今已下跌约 35%。 - 像 $CRM 这样的软件下降了-40%。 - 比特币低于 6 万美元，以太坊低于 1.6 万美元。美联储的强硬言论和潜在的加息并不是一个有趣的时刻。然而，由于与大型股相比，流动性较低的资产的保证金清算，这确实让人感觉有些过头了。但我们会看看会发生什么，从长远来看，基本面通常会压倒流动性冲击。我个人仍然看好人工智能建设+上游人工智能资本支出受益者，但1-2次潜在的加息肯定没有帮助。

tweets.content: The $WEN meme traders made it to Global Media from Japan to US! The burger fast food chain is now up ~50%, which is pretty impressive. Feels bad to be sidelined and see my AI memory/optical portfolio perform worse than a $RDDT memestock tho. Did anyone take positions?
tweets.translated: $WEN 表情包交易者成功登陆从日本到美国的 Global Media！汉堡快餐连锁店现在上涨了约 50%，这是相当令人印象深刻的。看到我的 AI 内存/光学投资组合表现比 $RDDT memestock 还差，被边缘化感觉很糟糕。有人上岗了吗？

tweets.content: Global markets in a nutshell: Japanese Company: Active monopoly over random chokepoints in the hyperscaler AI buildout. Valuation: $150m-$350M Silicon Valley: Here's a $200m for a "Seed Round".
tweets.translated: 全球市场简而言之：日本公司：对超大规模人工智能建设中的随机瓶颈的积极垄断。估值：1.5 亿至 3.5 亿美元 硅谷：“种子轮”融资 2 亿美元。
